title: selaginella applanata
intro: Selaginella applanata, also known as the flat spike moss or creeping selaginella, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella applanata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used in poultices or compresses.
